name: golang-github-jacobsa-syncutil-dev
title: golang-github-jacobsa-syncutil-dev
summary: code that supplements the Go stdlib sync package
description:
code that supplements the Go stdlib sync package
This package contains code that supplements the sync package from the Go
standard library. In particular:
.
* Bundle, which makes it easy to write code that spawns multiple
cancellation-aware workers that may fail.
* InvariantMutex, which makes it possible to automatically check your
invariants at lock and unlock time.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-jacobsa-syncutil-dev because code that supplements the Go stdlib sync package.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-jacobsa-syncutil-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-jacobsa-syncutil-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-jacobsa-syncutil-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
